name: Garden Tomato Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Coarsely chop basil leaves.
3. Peel and seed the tomatoes, then coarsely chop them.
4. Mince the garlic.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Add the chopped tomatoes, salt, pepper, and minced garlic to the skillet; cook covered until thickened, about 8 minutes. Do not overcook.
7. Add the basil leaves to the sauce; stir to heat through.
8. Pour the mixture over the pasta and mix to combine.
9. May be served hot or chilled.
